title: eriogonum incanum
intro: Eriogonum incanum, also known as the gray buckwheat or gray Mormon tea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum incanum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
